summary: scripts/clean_bodies.py: hardened in-place strip patterns (id-preserving) with dry-run diff mode
description: Implement from the audit's pattern table. Operates on corpus/*/*/chunks/*.toml bodies AND live nodes rows in data/guru.db; never renumbers or drops chunks. Must have: --dry-run emitting unified diffs per text for review; recomputes chunk.token_count after strip; refuses any strip that removes >X% of a body (tunable guard against pattern overreach). Supersedes a straight port of retriever.ts NAV_PREFIX/PAGE_MARKER/APPARATUS_DROP.

resolution.note: scripts/clean_bodies.py implements audit classes P1-P6 plus P1B (inline trailing nav — 650 Plotinus chunks the audit probe missed because the nav is glued to paragraph ends). Dry-run mode emits unified diffs; shrink guard (default 25%) correctly refuses 7 chunks incl. enoch-charles-1917.140 which would empty (whole-chunk errata -> 50438e23). Domain-dot bug in scanned-at pattern found and fixed during dry-run iteration.
